Part.Source:
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Lista de Pedido Compra"
Header if &Context.EmpCod.IsEmpty() LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan &Phone = FilFonNum &Mail = FilEml &Website = FilSit &AddressLine1 = FilLogNro &AddressLine2 = FilBai &AddressLine3 = FilCidNom +', '+ FilCidUfeCod Print printTitle EndFor
End
//Footer // &PageInfo = "Page: " + &Page.ToString().Trim() // &DateInfo = "Date: " + &Today.ToFormattedString() // Print printFooter //End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Do 'PrintFooter'
Sub 'PrintFilters'
If not &PedBlq.IsEmpty() &FilterPedBlqValueDescription = &PedBlq.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPedBlq EndIf If not &FilCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterFilCod EndIf If not &LctTip.IsEmpty() &FilterLctTipValueDescription = &LctTip.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterLctTip EndIf If not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty() &FilterLctAtuSalValueDescription = &LctAtuSal.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterLctAtuSal EndIf If not &PedCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPedCod EndIf If not &PedSts.IsEmpty() &FilterPedStsValueDescription = &PedSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPedSts EndIf If not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPedCliCod EndIf If not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPedCliRaz EndIf If not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty() &FilterPedStsFinValueDescription = &PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterPedStsFin EndIf If not &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterPedDtaEms EndIf If not &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Em.", "à") print printBlockFilterPedDtaEms_To EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &LctCod1.IsEmpty() &LctCod = &LctCod1 print printBlockFilterLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PedDtaFat1.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = "Faturado" &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat1 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf If not &PedDtaFat_To1.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Faturado", "até") &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat_To1 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PedNum1.IsEmpty() &PedNum = &PedNum1 print printBlockFilterPedNum EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &LctCod2.IsEmpty() &LctCod = &LctCod2 print printBlockFilterLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PedDtaFat2.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = "Faturado" &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat2 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf If not &PedDtaFat_To2.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Faturado", "até") &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat_To2 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PedNum2.IsEmpty() &PedNum = &PedNum2 print printBlockFilterPedNum EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &LctCod3.IsEmpty() &LctCod = &LctCod3 print printBlockFilterLctCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) If not &PedDtaFat3.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = "Faturado" &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat3 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf If not &PedDtaFat_To3.IsEmpty() &FilterPedDtaFatDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Faturado", "até") &PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat_To3 print printBlockFilterPedDtaFat EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &PedNum3.IsEmpty() &PedNum = &PedNum3 print printBlockFilterPedNum EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData'
&TotalBruto.SetEmpty() &TotalLiquido.SetEmpty()
For each order EmpCod FilCod (PedCod) using DSwwPedidoCompra(&FilCod, &PedFatFiLCod, &PedBlq, &LctTip, &LctAtuSal, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedCliCod, &PedCliRaz, &PedStsFin, &PedNovStsFinCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &LctCod1, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &PedNum1,&PedvenCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2 , &LctCod2, &PedDtaFat2, &PedDtaFat_To2, &PedNum2,&PedvenCod2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3 , &LctCod3, &PedDtaFat3, &PedDtaFat_To3, &PedNum3,&PedvenCod3) &gridPedCliCodRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz) &PedStsDescription = PedSts.EnumerationDescription() &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3))
&TotalBruto += PedVlrBrt &TotalLiquido += PedVlrLiq
Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor
print Total
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
If &Session.Get(!"wwPedidoCompraGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwPedidoCompraGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwPedidoCompraGridState")) Endif
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
EndSub
